description: Horizons Patch 2 (20 November 2024) — Season 24 Winner Statues Unveiled, New Boss Lairs, Territory Raiding Changes, Mob Combat Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: New Boss Lairs

items.text: There is now a new Boss Lair for each faction (Undead, Heretic, Morgana)
The +200% loot bonus for Boss Lairs has been removed, but now there are 3 chests instead of 1
Each Boss Lair now contains only the boss, and no other mobs
Their entrances in the open world have been modified slightly

sections.searchable_text: New Boss Lairs There is now a new Boss Lair for each faction (Undead, Heretic, Morgana) The +200% loot bonus for Boss Lairs has been removed, but now there are 3 chests instead of 1 Each Boss Lair now contains only the boss, and no other mobs Their entrances in the open world have been modified slightly

sections.heading: Territory Raiding Changes

items.text: Once a banner has been dropped and channeled, the time until it is destroyed has been reduced from 5 minutes to 3 minutes
Raid Banners can no longer be used to raid a territory if an older Raid Banner is already active there, or if two banners are spawned simultaneously

subitems.text: In order to raid a territory with your own banner, older Raid Banners must first be destroyed
Raid Banners that need to be destroyed first are visually distinguished on the minimap
If two Raid Banners are raised within 30 seconds of each other, one must be destroyed before the other can be used to raid
Raid Banners that are raised later on in the battle cannot be used to prevent raiding

sections.searchable_text: Territory Raiding Changes Once a banner has been dropped and channeled, the time until it is destroyed has been reduced from 5 minutes to 3 minutes Raid Banners can no longer be used to raid a territory if an older Raid Banner is already active there, or if two banners are spawned simultaneously In order to raid a territory with your own banner, older Raid Banners must first be destroyed Raid Banners that need to be destroyed first are visually distinguished on the minimap If two Raid Banners are raised within 30 seconds of each other, one must be destroyed before the other can be used to raid Raid Banners that are raised later on in the battle cannot be used to prevent raiding

sections.heading: Mob Combat Changes

items.text: Spells and combat behavior have been updated for a number of mobs
Out-of-combat status in PvE now begins when the mob is killed, rather than when its corpse disappears

sections.searchable_text: Mob Combat Changes Spells and combat behavior have been updated for a number of mobs Out-of-combat status in PvE now begins when the mob is killed, rather than when its corpse disappears

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: As a followup to our Solo Dynamic Encampment loot increases in Patch 1, Group Dynamic Encampments now award less Fame and Objective progress to players if they are solo or in very small groups

subitems.text: Our intent with this, along with the changes in Patch 1, is to create rewarding gameplay loops both for solo players in Solo Encampments, and for group players in Group Encampments

items.text: Mini roaming mob camps in the open world no longer spawn around World Bosses
Equipping food or potions now puts all spells on a 10 second cooldown
Enchantment Level 4 Treasure Resources are now more likely to unlock at Prime Time, rather than spawning at Prime Time and unlocking later
Certain items are now less expensive to Journey Back or use a S.A.F.E. Portal with

subitems.text: This mostly affects Randomized Dungeon Maps and Player Island furniture

items.text: The radius of the Crystal Beetle’s ‘Magical Discharge’ spell has been significantly increased
Hostile player count in safe regions now only counts players explicitly flagged as hostile, not unflagged players in open PvP areas
Guild Codexes (guilds’ internal descriptions) can now be edited by any member with the ‘Change Guild Logo’ permission

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes

items.text: Relentless Assault (Crystal Reaper)

subitems.text: Leaving the area does not end the spell
Hitting enemies while outside of the area does not reduce weapon ability cooldowns

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Relentless Assault (Crystal Reaper) Leaving the area does not end the spell Hitting enemies while outside of the area does not reduce weapon ability cooldowns

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs

items.text: Sanctify (Exalted Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sanctify (Exalted Staff) Cast Range: 8m → 10m

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

items.text: Soul Link (Ironroot Staff)

subitems.text: Casting both parts on the same target now resets its cooldown

items.text: Circle of Life (Nature Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Soul Link (Ironroot Staff) Cooldown: 20s → 12s Energy cost: 18% → 11% Duration: 7s → 5s Ally/ally effect Ally/enemy effect Casting both parts on the same target now resets its cooldown Circle of Life (Nature Staff) Max targets: 5 → 10

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

items.text: Soul Shaker (Grailseeker)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Soul Shaker (Grailseeker) Area duration: 3.5s → 4s Multicast time window: 3s → 5s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs

items.text: Werewolf Transformation (Bloodmoon Staff)

subitems.text: Lifesteal is now only triggered by Werewolf form abilities

items.text: Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs)
Sinister Swipes (Prowling Staff)
Spirit Bear Transformation (Primal Staff)
Tether Shift (all Shapeshifter Staffs)

subitems.text: Dash now applies a shield to yourself which absorbs 200 damage for 1.5s

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Werewolf Transformation (Bloodmoon Staff) Bloody Roar lifesteal: 6% -] 8% (while below 40% health) Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage per tick: 54 → 48 No longer reflectable Sinister Swipes (Prowling Staff) Range: 4m → 5m Spirit Bear Transformation (Primal Staff) Cooldown: 5s → 10s Tether Shift (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Dash now applies a shield to yourself which absorbs 200 damage for 1.5s

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Ice Block (Cleric Cowl)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Ice Block (Cleric Cowl) Cooldown: 60s → 90s Removed 50% healing debuff while frozen

subsections.heading: Shoes

items.text: Dodge (all Shoes)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Dodge (all Shoes) Added immunity to transformation

subsections.heading: Capes

items.text: Devious Trap (Heretic Cape)
Energy Reserve (Lymhurst Cape)

subsections.searchable_text: Capes Devious Trap (Heretic Cape) Trap hit delay: 0.8s → 0.4s Energy Reserve (Lymhurst Cape) Energy restoration: 80% → 70%

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts

items.text: Healing Sapling (Ancient Ent)
Ent's Blessing (Ancient Ent)

subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts Healing Sapling (Ancient Ent) Cooldown: 4s → 3s Radius: 2.5m → 4m Ent's Blessing (Ancient Ent) Can no longer be interrupted

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Albion Journal fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the mission ‘Raise all different types of animals’ could not be completed because it required an obsolete animal
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Knock down another player in a Yellow Zone’ could be completed by knocking down oneself with self-damaging spells

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal fixes Fixed issue where the mission ‘Raise all different types of animals’ could not be completed because it required an obsolete animal Fixed issue where the mission ‘Knock down another player in a Yellow Zone’ could be completed by knocking down oneself with self-damaging spells

subsections.heading: Spell fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) could knock-up targets with forced movement immunity

subsections.searchable_text: Spell fixes Fixed issue where Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) could knock-up targets with forced movement immunity

subsections.heading: Mount fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Phalanx Beetle and Roving Bastion dismount cooldowns were higher than intended
Morgana Raven: Fixed issue where Reactive Scream’s fear would ignore forced movement immunity

subsections.searchable_text: Mount fixes Fixed issue where Phalanx Beetle and Roving Bastion dismount cooldowns were higher than intended Cooldowns are now 30 seconds Morgana Raven: Fixed issue where Reactive Scream’s fear would ignore forced movement immunity

subsections.heading: UI fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where player count display would sometimes fail to update immediately after changing regions
Fixed issue where player nametags would sometimes fail to display in safe regions
Fixed issue where gathering tooltips would not scale correctly with window size
Fixed issue where chat window size would reset after saving HUD changes
Fixed issue where the Bandit Assault countdown would remain on the World Map after changing servers
Fixed issue where, after an Arena battle, the Player Stats UI would open under the Arena Stats UI when clicking a player’s avatar
Fixed issue where some UI elements would not function correctly after entering a Randomized Dungeon
Various fixes and improvements made to the Travel Planner UI

subsections.searchable_text: UI fixes Fixed issue where player count display would sometimes fail to update immediately after changing regions Fixed issue where player nametags would sometimes fail to display in safe regions Fixed issue where gathering tooltips would not scale correctly with window size Fixed issue where chat window size would reset after saving HUD changes Fixed issue where the Bandit Assault countdown would remain on the World Map after changing servers Fixed issue where, after an Arena battle, the Player Stats UI would open under the Arena Stats UI when clicking a player’s avatar Fixed issue where some UI elements would not function correctly after entering a Randomized Dungeon Various fixes and improvements made to the Travel Planner UI

subsections.heading: Other fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where some mobs in the Hardcore Expedition ‘Fistful of Silver’ had higher resistances than intended
Fixed issue where Mists Encampments could sometimes contain mobs that did not count towards completing the quest
Fixed issue where some Resource Guardians would grant too little Fame
Fixed issue where rerolling an item’s quality would sometimes incorrectly state that the player’s inventory is full
Fixed issue where saved frame rate settings would not be applied immediately after starting the game
Fixed issue where the Forgotten General mob would perform a slide after its auto-attacks
Fixed issue where guild logos on the ground of Guild Islands would appear mirrored
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where emotes could not be used with custom hotkeys
